lanes.goal: define operator acceptance drill record and schema
lanes.expected_output: operator acceptance drill schema and writer
lanes.stop_condition: stop if drill record omits approval, reproduction, rollback, outcome, learning, Mission Control, risk, safety, or not-proven boundaries

lanes.goal: verify drill chain and Mission Control projection
lanes.expected_output: operator acceptance drill audit and release-state gate
lanes.stop_condition: stop if missing learning, outcome, rollback, reproduction, approval, or safety boundary can pass

join_packet.blocker_summary: production provider execution remains intentionally blocked outside v9.0 scope
join_packet.merge_rationale: Contract and audit lanes jointly define a bounded operator acceptance gate.

not_proven: Parallel lane evidence does not prove autonomous parallel execution speed, production provider correctness, or independent operator adoption.
